inclusion_criteria: Randomized controlled trials (parallel or cross-over) comparing an active treatment to placebo or sham; add-on designs allowed if both arms receive identical background therapy with placebo/sham as the comparator.

Adults (≥18 years) with unipolar major depressive disorder meeting treatment-resistant criteria (nonresponse to ≥2 adequate antidepressant trials) diagnosed via standardized criteria (e.g., DSM/ICD), explicitly excluding bipolar or psychotic depression.

Interventions include pharmacologic and neuromodulatory antidepressant treatments of interest (e.g., ketamine/esketamine, aripiprazole, minocycline, ECT, rTMS, theta-burst stimulation, and other prespecified antidepressant modalities), as monotherapy or augmentation.
Reports response rate (e.g., ≥50% reduction on validated scales such as HAM-D or MADRS) or provides data permitting calculation of response-based odds ratios.
exclusion_criteria: Non-randomized, uncontrolled, open-label, single-arm, observational studies, case series/reports, or trials without a placebo/sham condition (active-comparator-only).

Populations including bipolar depression, psychotic depression/schizoaffective or primary psychotic disorders, participants <18 years, or samples without confirmed TRD (fewer than two failed adequate antidepressant trials) or mixed samples without separable TRD data.

Interventions outside the prespecified antidepressant pharmacologic/neuromodulatory treatments (e.g., psychotherapy-only, exercise-only, or non-specified supplements) or multicomponent programs where the target intervention’s effect cannot be isolated.
Studies that do not report response outcomes or sufficient data to derive response-based odds ratios using validated depression scales.
screening_criteria.description: Screening RCTs in adults with treatment-resistant unipolar depression, testing specified antidepressant pharmacologic or neuromodulatory treatments versus placebo/sham, and reporting response rates suitable for odds ratio estimation.

included_articles.title: Accelerated Theta-Burst Stimulation for Treatment-Resistant Depression: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
